title: Project Miner Temp Power Durable Field Record Live Admission
authority_basis: Jason's 2026-05-18 standing PM blocker authority as repo technical authority and project stakeholder.
objective: Clear the post-schedule/status durable field record blocker by admitting one insert-only Temp Power field-start readiness record, without opening production quantities, evidence attachment storage, customer reporting, or finance outputs.
preconditions: PM Lane 277 approval row reads back as approved_for_import_packet.
PM Lane 278 import reads back as imported with current_candidate_match=true and counts_match=true.
PM Lane 279 field authorization and assignment reads back as 184 assignments for 184 unique imported apparatus rows.
PM Lane 280 schedule/status readiness reads back as 15 ready tasks, 184 ready apparatus, 7 not_started workpackages, 184 assignments, and 0 issues.
No existing durable field record seam was present before PM Lane 281.
scope: Add durable field record store adapters for memory and Supabase-backed stores.
Add focused tests for accepted write, idempotent replay, replay mismatch rejection, precondition rejection, and downstream-authority widening rejection.
Extend deployed mutation-seam smoke coverage for durable field record route/readback registration.
Persist one deterministic PM Lane 281 field-start readiness record after hosted deploy.
not_allowed: No customer report, completion evidence, or customer commitment.
No billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance output.
No source workbook or PDF writeback.
No new service, DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
No autonomous AI business-state mutation beyond the single durable readiness record explicitly admitted here.
validation_plan: Apply migration 004 to the runtime DSN without printing secrets.
Hosted readback before live write: durable field record status reports no_durable_field_record and storage_available=true.
Hosted live POST: accepted durable readiness record.
Hosted same-payload replay: idempotent_hit with no second record.
Hosted readback after replay: durable_field_recorded and downstream production/customer/finance authorities not_admitted.
Hosted smokes: deployed mutation-seam smoke with PM intake, hosted PM intake smoke, hosted operations routes smoke.
local_validation_result: PASS: durable field record tests passed, import persistence tests passed, approval persistence tests passed, py_compile passed, migration applied to runtime DSN, table/trigger/RLS/read-count preflight passed, and scoped git diff check passed.
next_recommended_lane: After live record closeout, the next blocker is production tracking admission after durable field record proof.
